title: The Foreman's Ledger
description: Trude's husband is three days missing from the Grimhollow mine. The foreman's ledger says he was 'reallocated.' The foreman does not know what that word means. He is still using it.

offer.speaker: Trude
offer.text: My husband is missing three days. The foreman's ledger says he was 'reallocated.' The foreman does not know what that word means. He is still using it.

offer.speaker: Trude
offer.text: The mine has been closed since. There is a man at the gate in judgment robes. I have never seen judgment robes at a mine. Neither has anyone here.

accept.speaker: Trude
accept.text: The ledger's on the foreman's desk in the office by the gate. Read it. Then tell me who is really writing it.

accept.speaker: Trude
accept.text: The math adds up. The words don't. That's the thing I want you to confirm before I trust myself on it.

decline.speaker: Trude
decline.text: Then I'll ask someone else. It's the third day. There won't be a fourth on which I do nothing.

in_progress.speaker: Trude
in_progress.text: You read the ledger? Say what you think it says. Say it plain.

ready_to_turn_in.speaker: Trude
ready_to_turn_in.text: The mine is open. You look like someone who has seen the inside of it. Sit down.

complete.speaker: Trude
complete.text: 'Reallocated.' You saw where. That word is going to mean something wrong forever, now that I've heard it used right.

complete.speaker: Trude
complete.text: The judge at the gate — you sent him off. He'll be back. His kind always are. But not for us. Whoever taught him that vocabulary is who I'd like to have a word with.

complete.speaker: Trude
complete.text: Take this. It was my husband's. A pick, well kept. He'd want it swung, not stored. So swing it.

objectives.description: Hear Trude out at the Grimhollow mine gate.
Read the foreman's ledger in the mine office.
Confront the judgment-robed man at the mine gate.

mage.description: Mage examine text on the ledger: the entries scan as a legal template someone lifted from a capital-court proceeding and then repurposed as bookkeeping. 'This is the wrong document dressed as the right one.' No mechanical effect.

cross_world_connection: The word 'reallocated' — foreman's ledger version — is the same term used by the Rivet Row union proposal in W4 ('overtime pay for workers who did not clock in'). The vocabulary is administrative-capital. Both usages have the same author, one generation removed.
_wiring_notes: Step 2 custom flag emitted by ledger examine tile in the mine office (cowir-overworld places; hook text = 'The math adds up. The words don't.'). Step 3 shared flag w1_arbiter_defeated wired to Arbiter Masterite encounter (Lane B). Item grimhollow_pick = new item, needs items.json entry (flavor: 'A working pickaxe. Handle polished by three shifts a day for eleven years.'). Design doc: Lane C row 3.
